_comment: v0.10 — Pre-built watch-list templates that clone into the editor when a user starts a new watch list. Each template mirrors the shape stored on a real WatchList row (minus DB-only fields like id/ownerId/timestamps). Field ids + operators match the FIELD_REGISTRY in src/lib/watch-list/fields.ts. Note: the field registry only exposes gte/lte/between for numeric fields — 'greater than' templates use 'gte' and 'less than' templates use 'lte' (the closest equivalents; boundary inclusion differs by 1 row at the edge). Decimal-percent fields (concessionRate, listingTrajectoryYoY) store 0..1 — so '20%' = 0.20.

templates.name: Scale-Density Rollup
templates.tagline: Evernest-style: roll up mid-size SFR independents in growth markets
templates.description: Targets independent SFR property managers with 100-500 doors per market, focused on growth markets with low concession use. Acquisition thesis is operational scale and density.

templates.name: Integrated Services Platform
templates.tagline: Genstone-style: acquire PMs where construction/insurance/services plug in for value capture
templates.description: Targets larger operators with concentrated footprints where adjacent service verticals (construction, insurance, in-house leasing) can be layered in. Acquisition thesis is multi-vertical value capture.

templates.name: Mid-Market Acquirer
templates.tagline: Typical 100-300 door deal: independent operators in growth markets
templates.description: Targets the bread-and-butter independent SFR operator in the 100-300 unit range. Acquisition thesis is straightforward roll-up at attractive valuations.

templates.name: Distressed Operator
templates.tagline: Turnaround thesis: operators showing operational stress signals
templates.description: Targets operators with high concession use and declining listing trajectory — indicators of operational stress and willingness to sell. Acquisition thesis is buying below replacement cost and improving operations.

templates.name: Institutional Platform
templates.tagline: Large fund target: 1000+ unit operators with multi-market footprints
templates.description: Targets institutional-scale operators across multiple markets. Acquisition thesis is platform acquisition for a fund-of-funds or institutional buyer.
